query:
SELECT LOWER(name) as lower_name, COUNT(*) as count, array_agg(id ORDER BY id) as ids, array_agg(position ORDER BY id) as positions
FROM players
GROUP BY LOWER(name)
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
